name: Credit Repair USA
description_short: Credit Repair USA disputes inaccurate items on credit reports and provides credit building solutions with month-to-month pricing starting at $149. Family, veteran, and woman-owned with 30+ years in the financial industry.
description_long:
Credit Repair USA is a family, veteran, and woman-owned credit repair company operating for over 30 years in the financial services industry. Based in Grapevine, Texas, the company specializes in credit dispute services, credit building solutions, and financial planning with a focus on transparency and personalized consultation. They operate by appointment only and emphasize a client-focused approach with dedicated credit specialists assigned to each client.

The company offers a three-step process: gathering and analyzing credit information through soft pulls, disputing inaccuracies and unverifiable entries with the three major credit bureaus and creditors, and providing ongoing education and monitoring through a secure client portal and mobile app. Their core credit repair service includes unlimited disputes to all three bureaus, monthly credit report monitoring, initial credit analysis, and challenges to creditors and collection agencies. They also offer credit building solutions, financial planning services, and educational resources through blogs and monthly reports.

Credit Repair USA distinguishes itself through straightforward, month-to-month pricing with no long-term contracts, a promotional rate of $149 to begin followed by $149/month for dispute services (with financial planning and advanced wealth-building priced separately). The company advertises a 5-star rating, emphasizes transparency with documented action plans, and claims clients save an average of $3,000-$4,000 in interest and fees during their engagement. They offer a 10% veteran discount and provide live support via phone, chat, text, and email during business hours (Monday-Friday, 9am-5pm).

While the website presents strong credentials and no-contract terms, potential clients should note that credit repair outcomes vary by individual case and depend heavily on the validity of disputed items. The company's claims about average savings and results are not substantiated with independent data on the website. As with all credit repair services, the fundamental work—disputing inaccurate items—is something consumers can legally do themselves for free, though professional guidance may accelerate results for complex credit files.

In the broader ecosystem of credit repair services, consumers have multiple paths to improving their credit. Professional credit repair companies can dispute inaccurate items with all three bureaus, while credit monitoring services provide ongoing alerts about changes to your reports. For those building credit from scratch, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured approaches. Consumers dealing with overwhelming debt may benefit from debt consolidation loans to simplify payments, or credit counseling through nonprofit agencies for personalized budgeting guidance. Consumers who successfully repair their credit often find better rates on installment loans, secured credit cards, and other financial products.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: No long-term contract required—month-to-month pricing at $149/month after promotional $149 startup fee
Unlimited disputes to all three credit bureaus with no limits on what can be challenged
Assigned credit specialist provides personalized consultation and ongoing mentorship
Transparent action plan provided upfront with clear strategy and timelines
Secure client portal and mobile app for tracking credit reports and progress
10% discount for active duty military, spouses, and veterans
30+ years of industry experience with claimed 5-star rating
cons: Services available by appointment only—no walk-ins or immediate access
Credit repair outcomes depend on legitimacy of disputed items; company cannot remove accurate negative information
Average savings claims of $3,000-$4,000 lack independent verification or case-by-case documentation
Consumers can dispute credit report errors themselves for free through the bureaus
Website lacks details on dispute success rates, average credit score improvements, or typical timeline to results
best_for: Consumers with documented credit report errors or unverifiable negative items who want professional guidance
Military members and veterans seeking credit repair with an additional 10% discount
Individuals building credit who want ongoing monitoring, education, and a structured action plan
People managing multiple disputed accounts or collection challenges who prefer hands-off dispute management
diagnosis: Credit Repair USA is best for consumers with verifiable credit report errors or unverifiable negative items who prefer professional management of disputes and want ongoing education and monitoring. The main caveat is that credit repair services cannot remove accurate negative information, outcomes vary by case, and consumers have the legal right to dispute items themselves for free—professional services primarily add convenience and expertise in managing complex disputes.
services: Credit report analysis and soft pull credit file review
Unlimited disputes to all three major credit bureaus (Equifax, Experian, TransUnion)
Challenges and disputes with creditors and collection agencies
Credit building solutions and credit builder product recommendations
Monthly credit report monitoring and progress tracking
Secure online client portal and mobile app for credit tracking
Personalized action plan development with assigned credit specialist
Monthly educational reports and financial strategy guidance
Credit counseling and financial mentorship services
Business credit management and personal credit management
Live phone, chat, text, and email support during business hours
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 312 W Northwest Hwy Suite 116, Grapevine, TX 76051
meta_description: Credit Repair USA disputes inaccurate items and provides credit building solutions. Month-to-month pricing starts at $149.
